name: comfyui-runpod-tools
description: Convenience scripts for comfyui-runpod (container UI dev/build, restarts).

scripts.ops:up: docker compose --profile ops up -d refresh_run_status report_experiment_queue_status queue_incomplete_experiments ws_event_tap
scripts.ops:down: docker compose --profile ops stop refresh_run_status report_experiment_queue_status queue_incomplete_experiments ws_event_tap
scripts.ops:rm: docker compose --profile ops rm -fsv refresh_run_status report_experiment_queue_status queue_incomplete_experiments ws_event_tap
scripts.ops:ps: docker compose ps refresh_run_status report_experiment_queue_status queue_incomplete_experiments ws_event_tap
scripts.ops:logs: docker compose logs -f --tail 200 refresh_run_status report_experiment_queue_status queue_incomplete_experiments ws_event_tap
scripts.status:once: docker compose exec -T watch_queue python3 /workspace/ws_scripts/refresh_run_status.py --server http://comfyui:8188
scripts.report:once: docker compose exec -T watch_queue python3 /workspace/ws_scripts/report_experiment_queue_status.py --server http://comfyui:8188 --newest-first --limit 10 --summary-only
scripts.history:backfill: docker compose exec -T watch_queue python3 /workspace/ws_scripts/backfill_history_from_outputs.py --server http://comfyui:8188 --try-fetch-history --extract-media-metadata
scripts.//tests: Python tests live under workspace/tests and are runnable inside the comfyui container.
scripts.test:py: docker compose exec -T comfyui sh -lc "cd /workspace && python3 -m unittest discover -s tests -p 'test_*.py' -v"
scripts.test:unit: docker compose exec -T comfyui sh -lc "cd /workspace/tests && python3 -m unittest -v test_apply_comfy_preset test_canonicalize_comfy_titles test_clean_comfy_workflow test_extract_comfy_preset test_tune_experiment_unit"
scripts.test:integration: docker compose exec -T comfyui sh -lc "cd /workspace/tests && python3 -m unittest -v test_integration_media_roundtrip"
scripts.test:acceptance: node -e "console.log('No acceptance tests defined yet.'); process.exit(0)"
scripts.//ui: Experiments UI helpers. Windows-native scripts are kept; Docker-native commands are provided too.
scripts.ui:build:docker: docker compose exec -T comfyui sh -lc "cd /workspace/experiments_ui/web && (test -f package-lock.json && npm ci || npm install) && npm run build"
scripts.//compat: Back-compat aliases for older script names.
